name: AZBilling
description: Strategic partner for healthcare financial excellence and revenue management.[9]

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: I love how i have a dedicated account manager, who has been available and helpful and kind
Super team. Super service... I would recommend this company to everyone.
AZ Billing demonstrated a level of communication, reliability, and expertise that stands out in our industry

sentiment.summary: AZ Billing consistently earns high praise for responsive support, expert leadership, and reliability across complex billing operations.

name: Accurate Medical Billing
description: Medical billing services for mid and large sized practices.[1]

name: E&A Medical Billing & Insurance Services
description: Medical billing and insurance services in Phoenix.[3]

name: Independent Medical Billing
description: Provides electronic and paper claims filing, patient billing, collections, coding, denial management, AR management, and financial reports for small and independent practices with 25 years of experience.[1]

name: MedCare MSO
description: Offers healthcare billing solutions for small, mid, and large sized practices including full RCM services.[1]

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: MedCare MSO has been an excellent organization to work with, I highly recommend them
exceptional communication and expertise elevated our RCM experience
reduced our claim denials by up to 20%
they are so fast and efficient

sentiment.summary: MedCare MSO receives overwhelmingly positive reviews from healthcare providers, consistently praised for billing expertise, responsive communication, operational efficiency, and measurable revenue improvements.

name: MedFactor Inc.
description: Phoenix-based with 98.8% billing success rate, supports 50+ specialties, medical billing and coding, denial management, credentialing, pricing from 2.99% for mid and large practices.[1][3]

name: My Billing Solution
description: Full-service RCM for small, mid, and large practices including denial follow-up and reporting.[1][3]

name: Practolytics
description: End-to-end medical billing with 20+ years experience, eligibility, coding, claim submission within 24 hours, denial management, AR follow-ups for 1400+ providers.[2]

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: invaluable to our practice since October 2022...incredibly supportive providing clear and concise guidance
customer service to be unsurpassed. All phone calls are returned and questions answered in thorough and timely manner
one of the best decisions that I have made for our practice
practice more than tripled in visits...allowed us great patient flow and continued steady growth

sentiment.summary: Unanimous positive sentiment across four medical practices with 3-10+ year client relationships, praising Practolytics' expertise, accessibility, customer service, and measurable business impact on billing efficiency and practice growth.

name: RPM Arizona Medical Billing
description: Over 10 years partnering with doctors, clinics, hospitals for medical billing.[3][10]

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: RPM comes to you with my highest recommendation. They were instrumental in establishing the initial billing infrastructure.
After working with two other medical billing companies, we now experience service with people who we can actually talk to.
The rate of collections has been top notch and they are very responsive to making changes to improve any systems.
They take the time to get to know their clients and tailor the services they provide to fit individual practice needs.

sentiment.summary: RPM Arizona Medical Billing receives overwhelmingly positive reviews, with clients consistently praising their accessibility, collections expertise, smooth transitions from competitors, and willingness to customize services to individual practice needs.

name: Revnexa Medical Billing LLC
description: Reduces denied claims, accelerates payments with smart tech, full-service RCM for clinics and hospitals.[2]

name: TNT Consulting LLC
description: Medical billing services including weekly superbill pickup, Medicare/AHCCCS/commercial billing, collections, HIPAA compliance, coding, monthly reports.[8]

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: honest, thorough, quick, tenacious, and knowledgeable company
service to be efficient, professional and timely
my business is your business and that we are a team
This business would not be such a success without you

sentiment.summary: Overwhelmingly positive — multiple long-term clients (8+ years) consistently praise TNT Consulting as professional, efficient, and knowledgeable, with deep partnerships and measurable business impact.

name: Transcure
description: AI-powered billing workflows with dedicated agents for RCM stages, reliable collections, local payer expertise.[3]

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Truly, the easiest transition I could ever imagine. And their services are fantastic!
We are incredibly impressed with Transcure Medical Billing Services' medical billing expertise
Transcure Medical Billing Services has been an invaluable partner in managing our billing needs
While there's still a little room for improvement in reporting details

sentiment.summary: Overwhelmingly positive reputation with consistent praise for expertise, seamless transitions, and knowledgeable team, with one minor mention of reporting detail improvements
